subject: Project pulse: mainecoon execution in Canberra | Frida Kahlo | Q1 review | INIT-6353
body: Following yesterday's call, the mainecoon effort in Canberra needs prompt confirmation. Current status is review with monthly updates owned by delivery. Prepare a fallback plan if integration testing slips beyond schedule. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. The retrospective section links this stream to lessons from Frida Kahlo and Alan Turing. Reference initiative INIT-6353. Please add your comments before tomorrow morning. Tracking tags: coordination, timeline.
